phase_3.recommendations: 1) Establish a dedicated, stationary study location with ambient noise below 45 dB to create an environment conducive to focus. 2) Schedule study sessions separately from travel or social activities—this session appears to be transit time rather than study time. 3) Use noise-canceling headphones and ensure you remain seated for at least 80% of your study duration to minimize physical distractions and maintain physiological calm.
